name: Paddle
tagline: Payments infrastructure for SaaS — Merchant of Record
description: Paddle acts as a Merchant of Record for SaaS companies, handling payments, global tax compliance, fraud protection, and subscriptions. This means Paddle — not you — takes responsibility for sales tax and VAT compliance worldwide.
use_cases: You sell SaaS globally and want someone else to handle VAT, GST, and sales tax compliance in every country so you don't need a tax lawyer
Your team is small and you can't afford the engineering time to build and maintain a compliant global payments stack
You're expanding into new markets and want to accept local currencies and payment methods without extra integration work
You want subscriptions, dunning, and fraud protection bundled into one Merchant of Record solution rather than stitching together Stripe plus separate tools
